name: tauroboros
description: TaurOboros - AI-powered workflow orchestration system with container isolation

scripts.build: bun build --target=bun src/index.ts --outdir dist && bun run kanban:build
scripts.kanban:build: cd src/kanban-solid && npm install && npm run build
scripts.kanban:dev: SERVER_PORT=3789 DEV_PORT=5174 bun run src/index.ts & sleep 7 && cd src/kanban-solid && npm install && SERVER_PORT=3789 DEV_PORT=5174 npm run dev
scripts.test:e2e: USE_MOCK_LLM=true bun run tests/e2e/prepare.ts && USE_MOCK_LLM=true bunx playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:ui: USE_MOCK_LLM=true bun run tests/e2e/prepare.ts && USE_MOCK_LLM=true bunx playwright test --ui
scripts.test:e2e:debug: USE_MOCK_LLM=true bun run tests/e2e/prepare.ts && USE_MOCK_LLM=true bunx playwright test --debug
scripts.test:e2e:headed: USE_MOCK_LLM=true bun run tests/e2e/prepare.ts && USE_MOCK_LLM=true bunx playwright test --headed
scripts.test:e2e:real: USE_MOCK_LLM=true bun run tests/e2e/prepare.ts && TEST_TYPE=real-workflow USE_MOCK_LLM=true bunx playwright test tests/e2e/real-workflow.spec.ts
scripts.test:effect-migration: bun run scripts/verify-migration.ts && bun test tests/effect-http-boundary.test.ts tests/frontend-store-boundaries.test.ts
scripts.setup: bun run skills:install && bun run skills:verify
scripts.mock-llm-server:build: cd mock-llm-server && npm install && npm run build
